description: Weatherstack is a weather data service that provides real-time, historical, forecast, marine, and location lookup data for locations worldwide. It is offered as a hosted API product with free and paid access plans.
summary: weatherstack.com exposes one authenticated REST weather API at https://api.weatherstack.com, using an API access key passed as the `access_key` query parameter; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was found.
